title: JPG to PNG Converter
hero_subheading: Convert JPG images to PNG format free online

how_to_use.title: Upload Source Image
how_to_use.description: Drag and drop your file into the upload zone or select it from your device storage explorer.

how_to_use.title: Pick Target Format
how_to_use.description: Choose PNG, JPEG, or WebP from the format select box, adjusting quality offsets.

how_to_use.title: Transcode and Save
how_to_use.description: The canvas converter runs the math locally. Click Convert and Download to export the file.

features.title: Bidirectional Mapping
features.description: Transcode elements seamlessly among JPG, PNG, and WebP formats without resizing.

features.title: Secure Client Execution
features.description: All conversions process in local offscreen buffers. Zero servers uploading preserves privacy.

features.title: Size Savings Estimator
features.description: Displays the original size vs converted size estimation in real-time helping optimize web assets.

features.title: Free Forever
features.description: No signup needed. No credit card. Completely free to use unlimited times.

features.title: Mobile Friendly
features.description: Works perfectly on phones tablets and desktop computers.

features.title: Browser Based
features.description: No installation needed. Works directly in your web browser.

faqs.question: Is JPG to PNG converter really free?
faqs.answer: Yes 100% free forever. No credit card no signup no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Do you store my images?
faqs.answer: No. Everything runs in your browser. Nothing sent to any server.

faqs.question: Does it work on mobile?
faqs.answer: Yes fully optimized for all devices including phones and tablets.

faqs.question: What is the maximum file size?
faqs.answer: You can convert images up to 10MB in size.

faqs.question: Can I use it unlimited times?
Do I need to install anything?
faqs.answer: No installation needed. Works directly in your web browser.

faqs.question: What formats are supported?
faqs.answer: JPG JPEG PNG and WebP formats are all supported.

faqs.question: How do I report a problem?
faqs.answer: Use the Contact link in footer and we will respond within 24 hours.
